mapper.sql: u.user_id, u.user_nm, u.ognz_id, o.ognz_se_cd, u.eml_addr, u.mblphn_no, u.tlphn_no, u.pswd_chg_dt, u.pswd_fail_cnt, u.acnt_lock_yn, u.last_logn_dt, u.master_yn, u.use_bgng_dt, u.use_end_dt, u.frst_reg_dt, u.frst_reg_user_id, u.last_chg_dt, u.last_chg_user_id
FROM com.tn_user u JOIN com.tn_ognz o ON o.ognz_id = u.ognz_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN u.use_bgng_dt AND u.use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_user (user_id, user_nm, pswd_hash, ognz_id, eml_addr, mblphn_no, tlphn_no, pswd_chg_dt, pswd_fail_cnt, acnt_lock_yn, master_yn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userNm}, #{pswdHash}, #{ognzId}, #{emlAddr}, #{mblphnNo}, #{tlphnNo}, NULL, 0, 'N', #{masterYn}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_user SET user_nm = #{userNm}, ognz_id = #{ognzId}, eml_addr = #{emlAddr}, mblphn_no = #{mblphnNo}, tlphn_no = #{tlphnNo}, master_yn = #{masterYn}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE com.tn_user SET pswd_hash = #{pswdHash}, pswd_chg_dt = NOW(), pswd_fail_cnt = 0, acnt_lock_yn = 'N', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{operatorId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
UPDATE com.tn_user SET acnt_lock_yn = 'N', pswd_fail_cnt = 0, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{operatorId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
